title: Kanbus clock: rotation persistence across reconnect/reboot
description: Make rotation policy persistent (default right-side-up), reapply on reconnect, and add a periodic rotation guard in kanbus_clock.

comments.author: ryan.porter
comments.text: Tests complete: py_compile on demos/kanbus_clock.py + src/pypixoo/raster.py and pytest tests/test_raster.py tests/test_kanbus_clock.py (73 passed). Added coverage for parser default, reconnect callback, desired mode mapping, and rotation guard loop.

comments.author: ryan.porter
comments.text: Device validation: restarted kanbus_clock with no rotation flags (new default path). Runtime logs show desired mode 0 and successful startup apply: 'pixoo: desired screen rotation mode 0' + 'screen rotation set to mode 0 (startup)'. Process running for live verification.
